name: Moo Goo Gai Pan
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole large chicken breast, skinned, halved lengthwise, and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze the chicken; thinly slice into bite-sized strips.
2. In a small mixing bowl, stir together the water, soy sauce, dry sherry, cornstarch, honey, and instant chicken granules; mix well.
3. Slice the drained water chestnuts; set aside.
4. Halve the pea pods crosswise; set aside.
5. Slice the mushrooms and green onions; set aside.
6. Grate 2 teaspoons of ginger root; set aside.
7. Heat the oil in a wok over high heat.
8. Add the chicken to the wok and stir-fry for 3 to 4 minutes. Remove the chicken.
9. Add more oil, if necessary.
10. Stir-fry the water chestnuts, pea pods, mushrooms, green onions, and ginger for 3 to 4 minutes.
11. Return the chicken to the wok.
12. Stir in the broth mixture and stir into the chicken.
13. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Cover and cook for 2 more minutes or until heated through.
14. This recipe serves 4 to 6.
